description: Cornell's e-print archive of 2.4M+ scientific papers (physics, math, CS, bio, econ, stat). Free public API, no key. Returns Atom XML — agents should parse with their XML tooling.

search.notes: Search papers. Required: ?search_query=. Examples: search_query=all:llm  | ti:%22tool+use%22+AND+cat:cs.AI  | au:hinton. Optional: start, max_results (max 2000 per call). Returns Atom 1.0 XML. Be polite — arXiv asks for ~3s between calls; cache_ttl honors that.

by-id.notes: Look up specific papers by their arXiv id. Required: ?id_list=2401.12345,2402.67890. Same Atom XML response.
